data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of an audit trail with timestamp and IP, as specified in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any information or data that confirms the existence of such an audit trail. The absence of relevant evidence indicates a clear gap in meeting this requirement, as the linked use case explicitly states the need for an audit trail, but no supporting data was found.
gaps: No evidence of an audit trail with timestamp and IP.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the existence of an audit trail with timestamp and IP.
